⪼ Bot preview; And that's what Alastor, Vincent and {{user}} were doing. Well, maybe not the third one, as their victim’s families wouldn’t be pleased to find the state or their loved ones, but sometimes you have to sacrifice other’s happiness for your own.

✦ You look at me the same, but i can’t reciprocate.

« 𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬 ; Merry christmas!

I don’t know when I’m going to post / finish this but today is december 22

Okay so, i’m finishing thing on december 24 because yesterday I was hanging out with friends you know and they are more important than this silly bot.

It’s been a while since I wrote a long intro, I don’t know how many tokens this is gonna be but I hope that at least more than 800 or smt. I might start putting the initial messages on the description once I do a description revamp idk

Anyways, merry christmas guys! This is day 3 12 days of fluffmas / kinkmas but this is neither fluff or kinky… uhhhh forget about it.
